This probably needs some or all of patch https://review.whamcloud.com/38058 "LU-14058 tests: clean up MDT name generation", with fixes to actually make it pass.  There is probably too much in that one patch, and it may be better to split it into separate parts.

Patch Set 1:

It looks like this is failing test_70e due to bad MDT naming:

 CMD: onyx-111vm2 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdt.*MDT0008.sync_lock_cancel
 CMD: onyx-111vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdt.*MDT0009.sync_lock_cancel
 CMD: onyx-111vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n 			mdt.*MDT00010.sync_lock_cancel

commit.subject: LU-14058 tests: fix conf-sanity/70e with 10+ MDTs
commit.message:
LU-14058 tests: fix conf-sanity/70e with 10+ MDTs

Fix conf-sanity test_70e with 16 MDTs.
Fix subtest script style to modern standards.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=conf-sanity mdscount=4 mdtcount=16
Signed-off-by: Wei Liu <sarah@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Iaaf999b5bb707aeca1ca296e24f6c74f45efa0f8
